 ,COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.END_COMPLETED_DATE AS DATE) ,CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE))PROVISIONING_COMPLETION_DT  
 ,COALESCE(SXOLA.TRUE_UP_TERM,0)     TRUE_UP_TERM_MTHS_CNT

 ,CASE WHEN SXOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE='MINOR' THEN COALESCE(CAST(ELOL.MANUAL_ACCEPTED_DATE AS date),CAST('1900-01-01'  AS DATE)) ELSE  COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.MANUAL_ACCEPTED_DATE AS date),CAST('1900-01-01'  AS DATE)) END  DV_ORDER_ACCEPTED_DT
 ,COALESCE(SXOLA.END_COMPLETED_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) SO_LINE_CLOSED_DTM

 ,COALESCE(SXOLA.END_COMPLETED_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  PROVISIONING_COMPLETION_DTM
 ,COALESCE(SXOLA.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDITS,0) SUBSCRIPTION_IB_CRDT_LOCAL_AMT

 ,CAST(COALESCE(SXOLA.MONTHLY_SUB_CREDITS,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) EST_MTHLY_SS_IB_CRDT_LOCAL_AMT

  ,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(SXOLA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS DV_OPL_LIST_UNIT_USD_PRC   
  ,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(SXOLA.MONTHLY_RECURRING_REVENUE   AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0)  DV_MTHLY_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT  
 ,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(INCRMTL_MTHY_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT1 AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS  DV_INCRMT_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT  
 ,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(NONRECURRING_REV_TRXL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS  DV_NON_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT   --XAAS PROD FIX FOR Q3FY18
 ,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(ANNUAL_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS  DV_ANNUAL_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT

  ,CASE WHEN  SXOLA.item_type_code='MINOR' THEN  case  ELOL.bundle_type   when 'SS' then 'Y'  else  'N'  end WHEN SXOLA.bundle_type='SS' then'Y'  ELSE 'N'  END  BUNDLE_SBSCRPTN_FLG
 ,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(SXOLA.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDITS AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS DV_SBSCRP_IB_CRDT_USD_AMT

 --,COALESCE(ELOL.INITIAL_TERM,SXOLA.INITIAL_TERM) INIITAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT     
  ,COALESCE(SXOLA.RENEWAL_TERM,0)  RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT

 ,SXOLA.LINE_REF_NUMBER BK_LINE_REF_NUM

 ,CASE WHEN SXOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE<>'MINOR' THEN
 CASE WHEN (SXOLA.ACTION_TYPE = 0 AND SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN CASE WHEN SXOLA.BUSINESS_SCENARIO=10 THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE 'NEW' END
 WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_TYPE = 1 THEN  CASE WHEN  SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 10 THEN  'MANUAL RENEWAL'
  WHEN  (SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 1 OR  SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN 'MODIFY'
  WHEN  SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 8 THEN 'REPLACE'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 5 THEN 'SUSPEND'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 6 THEN 'RESUME'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 9 THEN 'TERMINATE'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 7 THEN 'AUTO RENEWAL'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 12 THEN 'REFUND'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE= 13 THEN 'MANUAL EXTENSION'
  WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2 THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN  'CANCEL SUBSCRIPTION' ELSE 'CHANGE CANCEL' END   ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
 END
 WHEN (SXOLA.ACTION_TYPE = 2 AND SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2) THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN 'CANCEL-CANCEL' 
     WHEN (SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=0 OR  SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=1) THEN 'CANCEL PENDING' END
 ELSE 'UNKNOWN'    END   ELSE CASE WHEN (ELOL.ACTION_TYPE = 0 AND ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN CASE WHEN ELOL.BUSINESS_SCENARIO=10 THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE 'NEW' END
 WHEN ELOL.ACTION_TYPE = 1 THEN  CASE WHEN  ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 10 THEN  'MANUAL RENEWAL'
  WHEN  (ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 1 OR  ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN 'MODIFY'  WHEN  ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 8 THEN 'REPLACE'
  WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 5 THEN 'SUSPEND'  WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 6 THEN 'RESUME'
  WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 9 THEN 'TERMINATE'   WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 7 THEN 'AUTO RENEWAL'
  WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 12 THEN 'REFUND'
  WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE= 13 THEN 'MANUAL EXTENSION'
 WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2 THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN  'CANCEL SUBSCRIPTION' ELSE 'CHANGE CANCEL' END  ELSE 'UNKNOWN'  END
 WHEN (ELOL.ACTION_TYPE = 2 AND ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2) THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN 'CANCEL-CANCEL' 
 WHEN (SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=0 OR  SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=1) THEN 'CANCEL PENDING' END

INNER JOIN   (SELECT COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM    $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE 
                        WHERE  SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW <> -999
) SSOL 
ON SXOLA.LINE_ID= SSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT NESS.*,COALESCE(NESS.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,NESS.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NESS WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NESS 
 ON NESS.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW=SXOLA.HEADER_ID
/*LEFT JOIN ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSON
ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=COALESCE(SSON.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SSON.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) AND SSON.SS_CODE='OPL'*/
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON (SXOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
ON (SXOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT   COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT ,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM    $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE WHERE TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID <> -999)SXOLAP 
    ON  SXOLAP.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID=SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID  
--AND SXOLAP.SS_CODE='OPL'
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID =SXOLA.ORDERED_ITEM
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON  (SXOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT) 
 LEFT JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL  
 WHERE BUNDLE_LINE='Y') STAGE
ON STAGE.LINE_REF_NUMBER =SXOLA.BUNDLE_ID
LEFT JOIN (SEL COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) LINE_ID, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE WHERE LINE_ID <> -999)  BUNDLE ON STAGE.LINE_ID=BUNDLE.LINE_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS NIC   
 ON (NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE=NIC.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE) 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL
ON SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_END
ON (NECALU_END.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)    
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
  ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID) 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_END_MN
ON (NECALU_END_MN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)    
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIPMN
  ON (NECALU_SHIPMN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID)  
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NCA_SOLD
ON NCA_SOLD.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT=CASE WHEN ( SXOLA.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO IN ('SW BASED','DEVICE BASED') OR  ELOL.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO IN ('SW BASED','DEVICE BASED') )
                               THEN SSO.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID  ELSE COALESCE(SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID) END 
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS 		    
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NCA_SOLD.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT            
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCDR
ON (NCDR.SK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE  = NESS.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
       AND NCDR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE  =  CAST(NESS.ORDER_DATETIME  AS DATE)   
       AND NCDR.SK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')
INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV WHERE SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT<>-6666) NSOLT
ON   NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SXOLA.ERP_LINE_ID
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_ATO ---join added a s apart of Q1fy19 sep change
ON NP_ATO.BK_PRODUCT_ID =SXOLA.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT
/* added below join for June release ATHENA*/
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL_consump
		ON (SXOLA.Bundle_id = ELOL_consump.line_ref_number
		and SXOLA.header_id=ELOL_consump.header_id)
WHERE SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN <> 'CLOUD-CBM'
)A WHERE 1 = 2

 ON (NECALU_END_MN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)    
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIPMN
   ON (NECALU_SHIPMN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID)  
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NCA_SOLD
 ON NCA_SOLD.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT=CASE WHEN ( SXOLA.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO IN ('SW BASED','DEVICE BASED') OR  ELOL.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO IN ('SW BASED','DEVICE BASED') )
                                THEN SSO.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID  ELSE COALESCE(SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID) END 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS       
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NCA_SOLD.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT            
  LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCDR
 ON (NCDR.SK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE  = NESS.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
        AND NCDR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE  =  CAST(NESS.ORDER_DATETIME  AS DATE)   
        AND NCDR.SK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')
 INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV WHERE SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT<>-6666) NSOLT
 ON		NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SXOLA.ERP_LINE_ID 
 LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_ATO ---join added a s apart of Q1fy19 sep change
 ON NP_ATO.BK_PRODUCT_ID =SXOLA.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT
 LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_ORDER_SOURCES  EL  
 ON COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)= COALESCE(SSO.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACQ_FLOW_CNTRL EL_CNTL
 ON COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 AND COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')=COALESCE(SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER MSO
 ON MSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =SXOLA.MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE MSOL
 ON MSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =SXOLA.MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID
 /* added below join for June release ATHENA*/
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL_consump
		ON (SXOLA.Bundle_id = ELOL_consump.line_ref_number
		and SXOLA.header_id=ELOL_consump.header_id)
		/*below join added for  GROGU APRIL change*/
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRD_TO_PRD_PLAN_LINK NPTP
	ON NPTP.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
	and NPTP.PLAN_NM=COALESCE(SXOLA.PLAN_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
 WHERE SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM')
 )A WHERE 1 = 2

--,0 DV_NON_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT         
,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(NONRECURRING_REV_TRXL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS  DV_NON_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT              --XAAS PROD FIX FOR Q3FY18
,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(ANNUAL_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS  DV_ANNUAL_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT                        
,COALESCE(SXOLA.BUNDLE_LINE,'N') BUNDLE_LINE_FLG                             
 ,CASE WHEN 
    SXOLA.item_type_code='MINOR' THEN 
   case  ELOL.bundle_type
    when 'SS' then
      'Y'
     else
      'N'
      end
   WHEN
    SXOLA.bundle_type='SS' then
   'Y' 
   ELSE 
   'N'  END  BUNDLE_SBSCRPTN_FLG
,COALESCE(CAST(CAST(CAST(SXOLA.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDITS AS DECIMAL(26,7))*COALESCE(CAST(NCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ),0) AS DV_SBSCRP_IB_CRDT_USD_AMT                                
 ,CASE WHEN SXOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'MINOR'  THEN COALESCE(ELOL.SELL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') ELSE COALESCE(SXOLA.SELL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') END AS SELL_TYPE_CD             
--,COALESCE(ELOL.INITIAL_TERM,SXOLA.INITIAL_TERM) INIITAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT       
 ,COALESCE(SXOLA.RENEWAL_TERM,0)  RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT    
 ,SXOLA.PREVIOUS_LINE_REF_NUMBER  PREVIOUS_LINE_REF_NUM      
,SXOLA.LINE_REF_NUMBER BK_LINE_REF_NUM               
 --,CASE WHEN SXOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE='MINOR' THEN  COALESCE(ELOL.CONTRACT_NUMBER,-999)  ELSE COALESCE(SXOLA.CONTRACT_NUMBER,-999 ) END AS LICENSE_CONTRACT_NUM_INT                 
,CASE WHEN SXOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE<>'MINOR' THEN
CASE WHEN (SXOLA.ACTION_TYPE = 0 AND SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN CASE WHEN SXOLA.BUSINESS_SCENARIO=10 THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE 'NEW' END
WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_TYPE = 1 THEN  CASE WHEN  SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 10 THEN  'MANUAL RENEWAL'
            WHEN  (SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 1 OR  SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN 'MODIFY'
            WHEN  SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 8 THEN 'REPLACE'
            WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 5 THEN 'SUSPEND'
            WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 6 THEN 'RESUME'
            WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 9 THEN 'TERMINATE'
            WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 7 THEN 'AUTO RENEWAL'
            WHEN SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2 THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN  'CANCEL SUBSCRIPTION' ELSE 'CHANGE CANCEL' END
      END
WHEN (SXOLA.ACTION_TYPE = 2 AND SXOLA.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2) THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN 'CANCEL-CANCEL' 
      WHEN (SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=0 OR  SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=1) THEN 'CANCEL PENDING' END
ELSE 'UNKNOWN'      
 END
ELSE 
 CASE WHEN (ELOL.ACTION_TYPE = 0 AND ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN CASE WHEN ELOL.BUSINESS_SCENARIO=10 THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE 'NEW' END
WHEN ELOL.ACTION_TYPE = 1 THEN  CASE WHEN  ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 10 THEN  'MANUAL RENEWAL'
            WHEN  (ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 1 OR  ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 0) THEN 'MODIFY'
            WHEN  ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 8 THEN 'REPLACE'
            WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 5 THEN 'SUSPEND'
            WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 6 THEN 'RESUME'
            WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 9 THEN 'TERMINATE'
            WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 7 THEN 'AUTO RENEWAL'
           WHEN ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2 THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN  'CANCEL SUBSCRIPTION' ELSE 'CHANGE CANCEL' END
    END
WHEN (ELOL.ACTION_TYPE = 2 AND ELOL.ACTION_SUB_TYPE = 2) THEN CASE WHEN SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=2 THEN 'CANCEL-CANCEL' 
      WHEN (SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=0 OR  SSO.ORDER_TYPE_ID=1) THEN 'CANCEL PENDING' END
ELSE 'UNKNOWN'      
 END
END  SBSCRPTN_ORDER_LINE_TYPE_CD              
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ON_PREMISE_ROLE,'N')                        ON_PREMISE_ROLE_FLG                              
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ITEM_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN')         ITEM_CATEGORY_CD       
 ,'OPL' MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD                             
--,COALESCE(BUNDLE_CCW.CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS CCW_BUNDLE_EXAAS_SBSCR_SOL_KEY
,COALESCE(SXOLA.PREPAY_TERM,0)  AS PREPAY_TERM_MTHS_CNT
,COALESCE(SXOLA.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN')  AS  BILLING_MODEL_NAME
,SXOLA.HYBRID_OFFER_FLG AS HYBRID_OFFER_FLG
,COALESCE(SXOLA.SUBSCRIPTION_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
,COALESCE(SXOLA.PREVIOUS_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_PREV_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
,COALESCE(NP_ATO.item_key,-999) AS CHANGED_ATO_CHILD_PRDT_KEY--Q1fy19 sep change
/*Added as part of SFP Rel - NOV*/
,NESS.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE
,COALESCE(NESS.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD
,COALESCE(SXOLA.CX_SUPPORT_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS CX_SUPPORT_TYPE_NAME
,CASE WHEN SXOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE='MINOR' THEN COALESCE(ELOL.EARLY_RENEWAL_FLG,'N') ELSE COALESCE(SXOLA.EARLY_RENEWAL_FLG,'N') END AS EARLY_RENEWAL_FLG  /*Q3FY21 Annuity release*/  
 /* Added as Athena June Rel*/ 
    ,COALESCE(SXOLA.CONSUMPTION_FULFILLMENT_MAPPING,'UNKNOWN') AS CONCATENATD_SOL_SKU_LNKAGE_TXT
 ,CASE WHEN  SXOLA.item_type_code ='BUNDLE' THEN
	                     COALESCE(SXOLA.CONSUMPTION_MODEL,'UNKNOWN')
	     ELSE 
	     COALESCE(ELOL_consump.consumption_model,'UNKNOWN')
	END CONSUMPTION_MODEL_TYPE_NAME
  ,CASE WHEN SXOLA.item_type_code ='BUNDLE' THEN
COALESCE(SXOLA.SUBSCRIPTION_BUNDLE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')
ELSE
COALESCE(ELOL_consump.SUBSCRIPTION_BUNDLE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')
END OFFER_CONFIGURATION_TYPE_NAME ,
CASE WHEN SXOLA.item_type_code ='BUNDLE' THEN		/*As part of Q1FY22 Athena Sep release */
COALESCE(SXOLA.SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN')
ELSE
COALESCE(ELOL_consump.SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN')
END SUBSCR_GRP_DEP_ID,
COALESCE(SXOLA.FLEXUP_FLAG,'N') AS FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG, 
COALESCE(SXOLA.CONSUMPTION_PERCENTAGE,0.000000) AS BILLING_SKU_CONSUMPTION_PCT
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ENT_AGREEMENT_ID ,'UNKNOWN') AS ENT_AGREEMENT_ID
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ENT_AGRMNT_COMMITMENT_TYP_NM ,'UNKNOWN') AS ENT_AGRMNT_COMMITMENT_TYP_NM
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_SUITE_DISC_PCT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_SUITE_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_POOL_DISC_PCT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_POOL_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(SXOLA.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_ENRL_DISC_PCT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_ENRL_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(SXOLA.REFERENCE_TRANSACTION_ID,-999) AS SUBS_ORD_REF_TRANS_ID		/* Added as part of Q1FY22 Annuity Oct release --mahhr*/
,COALESCE(SXOLA.SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG,'N') AS SUBS_AUTO_RENEW_CHANGD_FLG
,SXOLA.USER_INTENT AS AVAIL_TO_RNW_USR_INTENT_NM /* SMR Nov-FY22 */
,SXOLA.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,SXOLA.THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM/* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
 ,COALESCE(SXOLA.MONTHLY_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,0) AS MNTH_NET_PRC_INC_CRED_LCL_AMT /*added as part of sol new attribute q2fy22 dec22 release*/
,COALESCE(SXOLA.MONTHLY_NP_EXCL_CREDIT,0) AS MNTH_NET_PRC_EXC_CRED_LCL_AMT /*added as part of sol new attribute q2fy22 dec22 release*/
,COALESCE(SXOLA.FREIGHT_CHARGE_LCL_AMT,0) AS FREIGHT_CHARGE_LCL_AMT
,SXOLA.PLAN_NAME CONFIG_PRC_QUOTE_PLAN_NM  /*This Column is Added for GROGU March Release*/
 FROM
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NOT  NULL) SXOLA 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SSO
ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.HEADER_ID
INNER JOIN   (SELECT COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM    $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE 
                        WHERE  SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW <> -999
) SSOL 
ON SXOLA.LINE_ID= SSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT NESS.*,COALESCE(NESS.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,NESS.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NESS WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NESS 
 ON NESS.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW=SXOLA.HEADER_ID
/*LEFT JOIN ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSON
ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=COALESCE(SSON.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SSON.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) AND SSON.SS_CODE='OPL'*/
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON (SXOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
/*ON (SXOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)*/
ON (SXOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORGID_CLOUD=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  /*MODIFIED AS PART OF CBM MAY REL */
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT   COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT ,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM    $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE WHERE TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID <> -999)SXOLAP 
    ON  SXOLAP.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID=SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID  
--AND SXOLAP.SS_CODE='OPL'
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID =SXOLA.ORDERED_ITEM
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON  (SXOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT) 
 LEFT JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL  
 WHERE BUNDLE_LINE='Y') STAGE
ON STAGE.LINE_REF_NUMBER =SXOLA.BUNDLE_ID
LEFT JOIN (SEL COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) LINE_ID, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE WHERE LINE_ID <> -999)  BUNDLE ON STAGE.LINE_ID=BUNDLE.LINE_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS NIC   
 ON (NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE=NIC.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE) 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL
ON SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_END
ON (NECALU_END.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)    
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
  ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID) 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_END_MN
ON (NECALU_END_MN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)    
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIPMN
  ON (NECALU_SHIPMN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID)  
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NCA_SOLD
ON NCA_SOLD.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT=CASE WHEN ( SXOLA.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO IN ('SW BASED','DEVICE BASED') OR  ELOL.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO IN ('SW BASED','DEVICE BASED') )
                               THEN SSO.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID  ELSE COALESCE(SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID) END 
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS 		    
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NCA_SOLD.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT            
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCDR
ON (NCDR.SK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE  = NESS.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
       AND NCDR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE  =  CAST(NESS.ORDER_DATETIME  AS DATE)   
       AND NCDR.SK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')
INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV WHERE SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT<>-6666) NSOLT
ON   NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SXOLA.ERP_LINE_ID
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_ATO ---join added a s apart of Q1fy19 sep change
ON NP_ATO.BK_PRODUCT_ID =SXOLA.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT
 /* added below join for June release ATHENA*/
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL_consump
		ON (SXOLA.Bundle_id = ELOL_consump.line_ref_number
		and SXOLA.header_id=ELOL_consump.header_id)
WHERE SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM')

)A WHERE 1 = 2
